message:
feat(gen_server,console): expand depth parity with upstream

gen_server (was 7 API fns, now 17):
- try_cast: non-blocking cast with WOULD_BLOCK on full mailbox
- info: separate info message channel (maps to cast internally)
- is_finished, is_closed: lifecycle queries
- name, calls_handled, casts_handled: introspection
- start_named: named server variant for discovery

console (was 6 API fns, now 18):
- Color mode: detect, set, get (none/ansi/256/truecolor)
- Style system: fg/bg color, bold/dim/italic/underline
- styled_write, bold, colored: styled text output
- clear, cursor_hide, cursor_show: terminal control
- str_width: ASCII display width measurement
- eprintln: convenience stderr output

Matches upstream gen_server.rs (35 pub fns) and console.rs (31 pub fns)
function families.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
